KeysToEntries.Wither.GameplayEffect.Name: Soul Rift
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.FirstInstance: You have become soul-rifted, and gained the attention of Imaru.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.PreventTeleport: Imaru's gaze prevents you from teleporting.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.MissedPool: Use your compass to find the closest Purification Pool.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.ImarusGazeStage1: Imaru smells your soul, find a Purification Pool and remove Soul Rift before she finds you.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.ImarusGazeStage2: Imaru draws closer, find a Purification Pool to remove Soul Rift before its too late.
KeysToEntries.SoulRift.FTUE.ImarusGazeStage3: Intertact with a Purification Pool to remove the Soul Rift state.
